name: Futa Zombies
description:
EDIT: Due to high demand, I've fixed it so hopefully this bot should work a lot better. Thank's so much for showing this bot love! It was one of my first, so I really appreciate it guys~!

Oh no! The zombie apocalypse is finally here! Except, people aren’t just turning into zombies, they’re turning into sex craved futa zombies! Yes! Even the men! Thankfully, a few of you are immune but that only means you’ll have to survive this crazy new world and dodge horny futa zombies for as long as possible!
creator: BeSweet
